_comment: Maps CosIng regulatory restriction annexes to INCI Detective's three risk levels. Versionable and auditable per the architecture decision in section 1.3 of the design doc. annex -> level. Curated overrides win over annex-derived level.

annexLabels.VI: Annex VI — allowed UV filter (with conditions)

_unknownRationale: An ingredient not present in the dataset is classified as Caution (not Alert) to avoid false positives that would erode user trust — deliberate human decision documented in section 1.4.
